name: COVENANT LOGISTICS GROUP, INC.
business: COVENANT LOGISTICS GROUP, INC. provides truckload transportation and logistics services through four reportable segments: Expedited, Dedicated, Managed Freight, and Warehousing. The company transports full trailer loads of freight primarily throughout the continental United States using company-owned equipment, leased equipment, or independent contractors. It also offers freight brokerage, transportation management, and warehouse management services.

exposures.sentence: Our asset based transportation services include two separate reportable segments: (i) Expedited and (ii) Dedicated, both of which transport full trailer loads of freight from origin to destination with minimal intermediate stops or handling.
AAT specializes in highly regulated, time-sensitive loads for the U.S. government.
LTST specializes in poultry feed and live haul transportation.

a significant portion of our business is in the retail industry, which continues to undergo a shift away from the traditional brick and mortar model towards e-commerce, and this shift could impact the manner in which our customers source or utilize our services

catalysts.event: Quarterly cash dividend increased to $0.07 per share
catalysts.sentence: In January 2022, our Board of Directors (the 'Board') approved a quarterly cash dividend program of $0.03125 per share, which was increased to $0.04 per share in August 2022, $0.055 per share in February 2023, and $0.07 per share in February 2025.

catalysts.event: 2026 net capital expenditure plan for fleet set at $40 million to $50 million
catalysts.sentence: Our baseline expectation for 2026 fleet net capital expenditures is a range of $40 million to $50 million which is a significant reduction compared to 2025 due to purchasing fewer new tractors in the year than we are selling.

tamClaims.claim: The truckload market is the largest portion of the for-hire ground freight transportation market based on revenue, surpassing the combined market size of less-than-truckload, railroad, intermodal, and parcel delivery combined.
tamClaims.sentence: The truckload market is the largest portion of the for-hire ground freight transportation market based on revenue, surpassing the combined market size of less-than-truckload, railroad, intermodal, and parcel delivery combined.
